name: Xia Dynasty
description: The Xia is recorded as the first hereditary dynasty in classical Chinese historiography. The Bamboo Annals and Sima Qian's Shiji document its founding by Yu the Great after taming the flood. Archaeological finds at Erlitou suggest a Bronze Age state correlating with Xia chronology. The Xia is credited with establishing the earliest calendar systems that form the basis of the sexagenary cycle.
descriptionTc: 夏朝被記載為中國古典史學中第一個世襲王朝。《竹書紀年》與司馬遷《史記》記載其由大禹治水後建立。二里頭考古發現表明存在與夏朝紀年對應的青銅時代國家。夏朝被認為建立了最早的曆法體系，為干支紀年奠定基礎。
descriptionSc: 夏朝被记载为中国古典史学中第一个世袭王朝。《竹书纪年》与司马迁《史记》记载其由大禹治水后建立。二里头考古发现表明存在与夏朝纪年对应的青铜时代国家。夏朝被认为建立了最早的历法体系，为干支纪年奠定基础。

relatedContent.title: Chinese Calendar: Origins of the Sexagenary Cycle
relatedContent.titleTc: 中國曆法：干支紀年的起源
relatedContent.titleSc: 中国历法：干支纪年的起源
relatedContent.text: The Xia Dynasty is traditionally credited with establishing the Xia Xiaozheng (夏小正), one of the earliest Chinese calendrical texts. This agrarian calendar tracked seasonal changes through stellar observations and laid the groundwork for the lunisolar system and the sexagenary cycle that would later become central to BaZi and Chinese astrology.
relatedContent.textTc: 夏朝傳統上被認為制定了《夏小正》，這是最早的中國曆法文獻之一。這部農業曆法通過恆星觀測追蹤季節變化，為後來成為八字和中國星相學核心的陰陽合曆與干支紀年體系奠定了基礎。
relatedContent.textSc: 夏朝传统上被认为制定了《夏小正》，这是最早的中国历法文献之一。这部农业历法通过恒星观测追踪季节变化，为后来成为八字和中国星相学核心的阴阳合历与干支纪年体系奠定了基础。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Chinese Calendar — Lunisolar System →
relatedContent.linkLabelTc: 更多：中國曆法——陰陽合曆 →
relatedContent.linkLabelSc: 更多：中国历法——阴阳合历 →

name: Shang Dynasty
description: The Shang dynasty produced the earliest confirmed Chinese writing — oracle bone inscriptions used for divination by heating tortoise shells and ox scapulae. These Jiaguwen records are the direct ancestor of the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches used in BaZi today. Shang bronze ritual vessels (ding) represent the pinnacle of early Chinese metallurgy and ceremonial culture.
descriptionTc: 商朝產生了最早確認的中國文字——甲骨文，用於加熱龜甲和牛肩胛骨進行占卜。這些甲骨文記錄是今天八字所用天干地支的直接祖先。商朝青銅禮器（鼎）代表了早期中國冶金術與儀式文化的巅峰。
descriptionSc: 商朝产生了最早确认的中国文字——甲骨文，用于加热龟甲和牛肩胛骨进行占卜。这些甲骨文记录是今天八字所用天干地支的直接祖先。商朝青铜礼器（鼎）代表了早期中国冶金术与仪式文化的巅峰。
keyContributions: Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches origin

relatedContent.title: Hanfu: Shang Clothing Foundations
relatedContent.text: The Shang Dynasty established the foundational principle of Hanfu: upper garment and lower skirt (上衣下裳, shàngyī xiàcháng). Archaeological evidence from Shang tombs reveals sophisticated silk weaving with complex geometric, dragon, and phoenix patterns — demonstrating that structured textile production and symbolic clothing were already integral to Shang civilisation.
relatedContent.textTc: 商朝確立了漢服的基本原則：上衣下裳（shàngyī xiàcháng）。商代墓葬的考古證據顯示了複雜幾何紋、龍紋和鳳紋的精緻絲綢織造——表明結構化紡織生產和象徵性服飾已是商代文明的核心組成部分。
relatedContent.textSc: 商朝确立了汉服的基本原则：上衣下裳（shàngyī xiàcháng）。商代墓葬的考古证据显示了复杂几何纹、龙纹和凤纹的精致丝绸织造——表明结构化纺织生产和象征性服饰已是商代文明的核心组成部分。

name: Zhou Dynasty
description: The longest dynasty in Chinese history, divided into Western (1046–771 BCE) and Eastern (770–256 BCE) periods. The Zhou era produced the foundational texts of Chinese civilisation: the Yi Jing (Book of Changes), the Shi Jing (Book of Songs), and the classical philosophical traditions of Confucius, Laozi, Zhuangzi, Sunzi, and Mencius. The Zhou consolidated the Mandate of Heaven doctrine and formalised the five-element cosmology.
descriptionTc: 中國歷史上最長的朝代，分為西周（1046–771 BCE）和東周（770–256 BCE）。周代產生了中華文明的基礎文獨：《易經》、《詩經》，以及孔子、老子、莊子、孫子、孟子等古典哲學傳統。周朝確立了天命學說並正式化了五行宇宙觀。
descriptionSc: 中国历史上最长的朝代，分为西周（1046–771 BCE）和东周（770–256 BCE）。周代产生了中华文明的基础文献：《易经》、《诗经》，以及孔子、老子、庄子、孙子、孟子等古典哲学传统。周朝确立了天命学说并正式化了五行宇宙观。

relatedContent.title: Hanfu: Zhou Ritual Clothing System
relatedContent.text: The Zhou Dynasty codified the formal ritual clothing system (冕服, miǎnfú) that linked garments to social rank and ceremony. The Zhouli established the twelve-symbol imperial robe bearing cosmological symbols, five ceremonial colours (blue-green, red, yellow, white, black) corresponding to the five elements, and strict rank differentiation — nobles wore silk while commoners wore hemp and ramie.
relatedContent.textTc: 周朝將正式禮服制度（冕服，miǎnfú）編纂成典，將服飾與社會等級和儀式相關聯。《周禮》確立了承載宇宙象徵的十二章紋帝王禮服、與五行對應的五種禮儀顏色（青、赤、黃、白、黑），以及嚴格的等級區分——貴族著絲綢，庶民著麻布。
relatedContent.textSc: 周朝将正式礼服制度（冕服，miǎnfú）编纂成典，将服饰与社会等级和仪式相关联。《周礼》确立了承载宇宙象征的十二章纹帝王礼服、与五行对应的五种礼仪颜色（青、赤、黄、白、黑），以及严格的等级区分——贵族着丝绸，庶民着麻布。

name: Qin Dynasty
description: The Qin unified China under a single imperial system for the first time. Qin Shi Huang standardised weights, measures, currency, and — critically — the writing system, enabling the transmission of calendrical and astrological texts across the empire. The Qin calendar reform adopted the Zhuanxu calendar, which begins the year in the tenth month, influencing later calendrical debates.
descriptionTc: 秦朝首次將中國統一於單一的帝國體制之下。秦始皇統一了度量衡、貨幣，以及至關重要的書寫系統，使曆法與星相學文獨得以在全帝國傳播。秦曆改革採用顱頔曆，以十月為歲首，影響了後世曆法之爭。
descriptionSc: 秦朝首次将中国统一于单一的帝国体制之下。秦始皇统一了度量衡、货币，以及至关重要的书写系统，使历法与星相学文献得以在全帝国传播。秦历改革采用颛须历，以十月为岁首，影响了后世历法之争。

relatedContent.title: Five Elements: Qin's Water-Virtue Ideology
relatedContent.text: Qin Shi Huang adopted Water as the dynasty's ruling element under the Five Virtues Cycle (五德終始說) theory of Zou Yan. Water overcomes Fire (the Zhou's element), legitimising Qin rule. This shaped Qin state symbolism: the colour black, the number six, and harsh legalist governance — all associated with Water's contracting, penetrating nature in classical wu xing cosmology.
relatedContent.textTc: 秦始皇依據鄒衍的五德終始說採用水德作為王朝的統治五行。水克火（周朝的五行），以此為秦朝統治正名。這塑造了秦朝的國家象徵：尚黑色、崇數六、行嚴苛法治——皆與古典五行宇宙觀中水的收斂、滲透特性相關。
relatedContent.textSc: 秦始皇依据邹衍的五德终始说采用水德作为王朝的统治五行。水克火（周朝的五行），以此为秦朝统治正名。这塑造了秦朝的国家象征：尚黑色、崇数六、行严苛法治——皆与古典五行宇宙观中水的收敛、渗透特性相关。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Wu Xing — Five Elements →

name: Han Dynasty
description: The Han solidified the Chinese identity and cultural institutions that endure to this day. Dong Zhongshu synthesised Confucianism with five-element cosmology into the state orthodoxy. The Taichu calendar reform of 104 BCE established the first month (Zheng Yue) as New Year — the origin of the Spring Festival. The Han saw the formalisation of the sexagenary cycle for counting years and the earliest systematic feng shui texts.
descriptionTc: 漢朝確立了延續至今的中華認同與文化制度。董仲舒將儒學與五行宇宙觀綜合為國家正統。公元前104年的太初曆改革確立正月為新年——這是春節的起源。漢代見證了干支紀年的正式化以及最早的系統性風水文獨。
descriptionSc: 汉朝确立了延续至今的中华认同与文化制度。董仲舒将儒学与五行宇宙观综合为国家正统。公元前104年的太初历改革确立正月为新年——这是春节的起源。汉代见证了干支纪年的正式化以及最早的系统性风水文献。

relatedContent.title: Hanfu: The Han Golden Age of Clothing
relatedContent.titleTc: 漢服：漢朝服飾的黃金時代
relatedContent.titleSc: 汉服：汉朝服饰的黄金时代
relatedContent.text: The Han Dynasty gave its name to Hanfu and established the clothing tradition that defined Chinese identity for two millennia. Classical garments such as the Shenyi (deep garment), Quju (curved-hem robe), and Zhiju (straight-hem robe) were codified during this period. The Mawangdui silk garments (168 BCE) — including a 49-gram gauze robe — showcase extraordinary refinement. Emperor Wu's dispatch of Zhang Qian in 138 BCE opened the Silk Road, sending Chinese silk to Persia and Rome.
relatedContent.textTc: 漢朝賦予了漢服之名，確立了定義中華民族身份兩千年的服飾傳統。深衣、曲裾和直裾等經典服飾均在此時期定型。馬王堆絲綢衣物（前168年）——包括一件僅重49克的素紗禪衣——展現了非凡的工藝水準。漢武帝於前138年派遣張騫出使西域，開闢了絲綢之路，將中國絲綢傳至波斯和羅馬。
relatedContent.textSc: 汉朝赋予了汉服之名，确立了定义中华民族身份两千年的服饰传统。深衣、曲裾和直裾等经典服饰均在此时期定型。马王堆丝绸衣物（前168年）——包括一件仅重49克的素纱禅衣——展现了非凡的工艺水准。汉武帝于前138年派遣张骞出使西域，开辟了丝绸之路，将中国丝绸传至波斯和罗马。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Hanfu — Han Dynasty Golden Age →
relatedContent.linkLabelTc: 更多：漢服——漢朝黃金時代 →
relatedContent.linkLabelSc: 更多：汉服——汉朝黄金时代 →

name: Sui Dynasty
description: The Sui reunified China after centuries of division. Though short-lived, the Sui rebuilt the Grand Canal, reformed the calendar, and established the Daye calendar which refined lunisolar calculations. The Sui's calendar work laid the groundwork for the Tang dynasty's more accurate astronomical measurements.
descriptionTc: 隋朝在數百年分裂後重新統一中國。雖然短暫，隋朝重建了大運河，改革了曆法，建立了精化陰陽曆計算的大業曆。隋朝的曆法工作為唐朝更精確的天文測量奠定了基礎。
descriptionSc: 隋朝在数百年分裂后重新统一中国。虽然短暂，隋朝重建了大运河，改革了历法，建立了精化阴阳历计算的大业历。隋朝的历法工作为唐朝更精确的天文测量奠定了基础。

relatedContent.title: Spring Festival: Sui Dynasty Celebrations
relatedContent.text: The Sui Dynasty's reunification revived large-scale New Year festivities that had fragmented during the centuries of division. Emperor Yang of Sui organised spectacular Lantern Festival (元宵節) celebrations in Luoyang, with the Suishu recording performances by tens of thousands of performers over a stretch of eight li. These grand displays re-established the Spring Festival as a unified national celebration rather than regional observances.
relatedContent.textTc: 隋朝的統一復興了在數百年分裂期間零散化的大規模新年慶典。隋煬帝在洛陽舉辦了壯觀的元宵節慶典，《隋書》記載了綿延八里、數萬人表演的盛況。這些盛大的慶祝活動重新確立了春節作為統一全國性慶典的地位，而非各地的分散慶祝。
relatedContent.textSc: 隋朝的统一复兴了在数百年分裂期间零散化的大规模新年庆典。隋炀帝在洛阳举办了壮观的元宵节庆典，《隋书》记载了绵延八里、数万人表演的盛况。这些盛大的庆祝活动重新确立了春节作为统一全国性庆典的地位，而非各地的分散庆祝。

name: Tang Dynasty
description: The Tang is regarded as the golden age of Chinese civilisation. Li Chunfeng's Linde calendar (665 CE) achieved the most accurate lunisolar calculations of the pre-modern era. The Tang court institutionalised astrology through the Bureau of Astronomy (Sitiantai), which maintained the sexagenary dating system. Tang poetry, painting, and cosmopolitan culture along the Silk Road represent the zenith of classical Chinese artistic achievement.
descriptionTc: 唐朝被視為中華文明的黃金時代。李淳風的麟德曆（665年）實現了前現代最精確的陰陽曆計算。唐廷透過司天台將星相學制度化，維護了干支紀年體系。唐詩、繪畫及絲路上的國際化文化代表了古典中國藝術成就的頂峰。
descriptionSc: 唐朝被视为中华文明的黄金时代。李淳风的麟德历（665年）实现了前现代最精确的阴阳历计算。唐廷通过司天台将星相学制度化，维护了干支纪年体系。唐诗、绘画及丝路上的国际化文化代表了古典中国艺术成就的顶峰。
keyContributions: Golden age of poetry and art

relatedContent.title: Hanfu: Tang Cosmopolitan Splendour
relatedContent.titleTc: 漢服：唐朝的國際化風采
relatedContent.titleSc: 汉服：唐朝的国际化风采
relatedContent.text: The Tang was the most cosmopolitan period in Chinese fashion history, absorbing influences from Central Asia, Persia, and India while maintaining the Hanfu structure. Women's fashion featured the Ruqun (short garment with high-waisted floor-length skirt), bold low necklines, and Hufu (Central Asian fitted jackets). Men wore the Yuanlingpao (round-collared robe), with colour indicating rank. Dunhuang murals and Tang Sancai pottery figurines preserve vivid records of this era's fashion.
relatedContent.textTc: 唐朝是中國時裝史上最具國際化的時期，在保持漢服基本結構的同時，吸收了中亞、波斯和印度的影響。女裝以襦裙（短上衣配高腰及地長裙）、大膽低胸領口和胡服（中亞合身外套）為特色。男裝以圓領袍為主，顏色標示官階。敦煌壁畫和唐三彩陶俑為這一時代的服飾留下了生動記錄。
relatedContent.textSc: 唐朝是中国时装史上最具国际化的时期，在保持汉服基本结构的同时，吸收了中亚、波斯和印度的影响。女装以襦裙（短上衣配高腰及地长裙）、大胆低胸领口和胡服（中亚合身外套）为特色。男装以圆领袍为主，颜色标示官阶。敦煌壁画和唐三彩陶俑为这一时代的服饰留下了生动记录。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Hanfu — Tang Dynasty Fashion →

name: Song Dynasty
description: The Song dynasty marks the maturation of BaZi as a systematic practice. Xu Ziping (c. 960–1025 CE) revolutionised Chinese astrology by shifting the focus from the Year Pillar to the Day Pillar as the primary indicator of destiny — the method still used today. Song-era geomancers also codified Compass School feng shui, producing the Luopan compass ring systems. The Song was an era of Neo-Confucianism, movable type printing, and gunpowder technology.
descriptionTc: 宋朝標誌著八字作為系統化實踐的成熟。徐子平（約960–1025年）將焦點從年柱轉移至日柱作為命運的主要指標——這一方法沿用至今。宋代堲輿家也編纂了羅盤學派風水，產生了羅盤圈層系統。宋朝是理學、活字印刷術與火藥技術的時代。
descriptionSc: 宋朝标志着八字作为系统化实践的成熟。徐子平（约960–1025年）将焦点从年柱转移至日柱作为命运的主要指标——这一方法沿用至今。宋代堲舆家也编纂了罗盘学派风水，产生了罗盘圈层系统。宋朝是理学、活字印刷术与火药技术的时代。
keyContributions: Xu Ziping's BaZi revolution (Day Pillar method)

relatedContent.title: Hanfu: Song Elegant Restraint
relatedContent.text: Song Dynasty Hanfu shifted toward refined elegance and understated sophistication, reflecting Neo-Confucian values of inner virtue over outward display. Soft, natural colour palettes (pale greens, muted blues, cream, dove grey) replaced Tang boldness. The Beizi (open-fronted outer garment) with narrow sleeves became characteristic of Song fashion. Hangzhou, Suzhou, and the Jiangnan region became silk production centres, and the drawloom invention enabled complex mechanical patterns exported via the maritime Silk Road.
relatedContent.textTc: 宋朝漢服轉向精緻典雅、含蓄內斂的風格，體現了理學崇尚內在德行而非外在展示的價值觀。柔和自然的色彩（淺綠、灰藍、米色、鴿灰）取代了唐朝的豔麗。褙子（對襟外衣）配窄袖成為宋代服飾的標誌。杭州、蘇州和江南地區成為絲綢生產中心，提花織機的發明實現了複雜紋樣的機械化生產，經海上絲綢之路出口。
relatedContent.textSc: 宋朝汉服转向精致典雅、含蓄内敛的风格，体现了理学崇尚内在德行而非外在展示的价值观。柔和自然的色彩（浅绿、灰蓝、米色、鸽灰）取代了唐朝的艳丽。褙子（对襟外衣）配窄袖成为宋代服饰的标志。杭州、苏州和江南地区成为丝绸生产中心，提花织机的发明实现了复杂纹样的机械化生产，经海上丝绸之路出口。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Hanfu — Song Dynasty Fashion →

name: Yuan Dynasty
description: The Mongol-ruled Yuan dynasty introduced the Shoushi calendar (1281 CE), created by astronomer Guo Shoujing. This calendar calculated the tropical year as 365.2425 days — identical to the Gregorian calendar, but 300 years earlier. The Yuan also facilitated cross-cultural exchange, bringing Islamic astronomical instruments and techniques into Chinese practice.
descriptionTc: 蒙古統治的元朝引入了郭守敬創制的授時曆（1281年）。此曆計算回歸年為365.2425天——與格里曆完全一致，卻早了300年。元朝也促進了跨文化交流，將伊斯蘭天文儀器和技術引入中國實踐。
descriptionSc: 蒙古统治的元朝引入了郭守敬创制的授时历（1281年）。此历计算回归年为365.2425天——与格里历完全一致，却早了300年。元朝也促进了跨文化交流，将伊斯兰天文仪器和技术引入中国实践。

relatedContent.title: Chinese Calendar: The Shoushi Calendar's Precision
relatedContent.titleTc: 中國曆法：授時曆的精確度
relatedContent.titleSc: 中国历法：授时历的精确度
relatedContent.text: Guo Shoujing's Shoushi Calendar (授時曆, 1281 CE) represented the peak of pre-modern Chinese astronomical achievement. Using a network of 27 observation stations across the empire and his invention of the Simplified Instrument (簡儀, jiǎnyí), Guo calculated the tropical year as 365.2425 days — a value not matched in Europe until the Gregorian reform of 1582, three centuries later.
relatedContent.textTc: 郭守敬的《授時曆》（1281年）代表了前現代中國天文學成就的巔峰。他利用遍布帝國的27個觀測站網絡及其發明的簡儀，計算出回歸年為365.2425天——這一數值直到三個世紀後的1582年格里曆改革才在歐洲達到同等精度。
relatedContent.textSc: 郭守敬的《授时历》（1281年）代表了前现代中国天文学成就的巅峰。他利用遍布帝国的27个观测站网络及其发明的简仪，计算出回归年为365.2425天——这一数值直到三个世纪后的1582年格里历改革才在欧洲达到同等精度。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Chinese Calendar — Lunisolar System →
relatedContent.linkLabelTc: 更多：中國曆法——陰陽合曆 →
relatedContent.linkLabelSc: 更多：中国历法——阴阳合历 →

name: Ming Dynasty
description: The Ming represents the final pre-Qing era and the culmination of classical Han Chinese cultural traditions. The Datong calendar continued the Shoushi system. Ming scholars like Wan Minying compiled comprehensive destiny-calculation manuals such as the Sanming Tonghui, which codified the BaZi system into the form practised today. Ming-era Luopan compasses reached their most refined form, and feng shui practice was systematised into the schools that survive into modernity.
descriptionTc: 明朝是清代以前的最後一個時代，也是古典漢族文化傳統的集大成。大統曆延續了授時曆體系。明代學者如萬民英編纂了《三命通會》等綜合性命理手冊，將八字體系編纂成今天所實踐的形式。明代羅盤達到最精緻的形式，風水實踐被系統化為延續至今的各流派。
descriptionSc: 明朝是清代以前的最后一个时代，也是古典汉族文化传统的集大成。大统历延续了授时历体系。明代学者如万民英编纂了《三命通会》等综合性命理手册，将八字体系编纂成今天所实践的形式。明代罗盘达到最精致的形式，风水实践被系统化为延续至今的各流派。

relatedContent.title: Hanfu: Ming Restoration and Splendour
relatedContent.titleTc: 漢服：明朝的復興與輝煌
relatedContent.titleSc: 汉服：明朝的复兴与辉煌
relatedContent.text: The Ming Dynasty consciously restored Han Chinese clothing traditions after the Mongol Yuan period. Founder Zhu Yuanzhang decreed the abolition of Mongol dress and revival of Tang and Song Hanfu forms. The Mandarin Square (補子) badge system was introduced — birds for civil officials (crane, golden pheasant), animals for military (qilin, lion). Women's fashion centred on the Aoqun (jacket + pleated skirt) with the distinctive horse-face skirt (馬面裙). A strict colour hierarchy reserved yellow for the emperor, red for high officials, and blue-green for lower ranks.
relatedContent.textTc: 明朝在蒙元統治後自覺恢復漢族服飾傳統。開國皇帝朱元璋下令廢除蒙古服飾，復興唐宋漢服形制。明朝引入了補子品級制度——文官繡飛禽（仙鶴、錦雞），武官繡走獸（麒麟、獅子）。女裝以襖裙（上襖配褶裙）為主，其中馬面裙最具標誌性。嚴格的色彩等級制度規定黃色為帝王專用，紅色為高級官員，青綠為下級官員。
relatedContent.textSc: 明朝在蒙元统治后自觉恢复汉族服饰传统。开国皇帝朱元璋下令废除蒙古服饰，复兴唐宋汉服形制。明朝引入了补子品级制度——文官绣飞禽（仙鹤、锦鸡），武官绣走兽（麒麟、狮子）。女装以袄裙（上袄配褶裙）为主，其中马面裙最具标志性。严格的色彩等级制度规定黄色为帝王专用，红色为高级官员，青绿为下级官员。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Hanfu — Ming Dynasty Restoration →

relatedContent.title: Spring Festival: The Yongle Emperor's 10-Day Lantern Festival
relatedContent.titleTc: 春節：永樂帝的十日元宵節
relatedContent.titleSc: 春节：永乐帝的十日元宵节
relatedContent.text: The Yongle Emperor (r. 1402–1424) expanded the Lantern Festival into an extraordinary ten-day public holiday — the longest in Chinese imperial history. The Ming Taizong Shilu records his 1409 edict instructing the Ministry of Rites to extend the celebration. The Aoshan Lantern Display (鰲山燈會) was an elaborate installation of the period. His grandson the Xuande Emperor wrote verses celebrating these displays. Yongle's philosophy was progressive: "如得斯民小康，朕之願也" — "If the people can achieve moderate prosperity, that is my wish."
relatedContent.textTc: 永樂帝（1402–1424年在位）將元宵節擴展為十天的公眾假期——中國帝制史上最長的節日假期。《明太宗實錄》記載了他於1409年詔令禮部延長慶祝活動的旨意。鰲山燈會是這一時期的標誌性燈飾裝置。其孫宣德帝賦詩讚頌鰲山燈景。永樂帝的執政理念體現了進步的民本思想：「如得斯民小康，朕之願也」。
relatedContent.textSc: 永乐帝（1402–1424年在位）将元宵节扩展为十天的公众假期——中国帝制史上最长的节日假期。《明太宗实录》记载了他于1409年诏令礼部延长庆祝活动的旨意。鳌山灯会是这一时期的标志性灯饰装置。其孙宣德帝赋诗赞颂鳌山灯景。永乐帝的执政理念体现了进步的民本思想：「如得斯民小康，朕之愿也」。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Spring Festival — Lantern Festival →

relatedContent.title: Dream of the Red Chamber: A Ming Dynasty Author?
relatedContent.titleTc: 紅樓夢：作者是明朝皇子？
relatedContent.titleSc: 红楼梦：作者是明朝皇子？
relatedContent.text: A 2023 research claim by Cao Dongfang argues that Dream of the Red Chamber was not written by Cao Xueqin (c. 1715–1763) but by Zhu Cizhao (朱慈炤, 1632–1708), the fourth son of the Chongzhen Emperor. Evidence cited includes Ming imperial palace objects described in the novel, the Jiǎxū manuscript at the Shanghai Museum, and coded character names. While the claim has attracted significant public attention, it has not been endorsed by mainstream Redology institutions, and the Cao Xueqin attribution remains the scholarly consensus.
relatedContent.textTc: 2023年，研究者曹東芳提出《紅樓夢》的真正作者並非曹雪芹（約1715–1763），而是朱慈炤（1632–1708）——崇禎帝的第四子。所引證據包括小說中描寫的明朝皇宮器物、上海博物館藏甲戌本手稿，以及書中人物姓名的諧音隱喻。此說雖引起廣泛公眾關注，但尚未獲得主流紅學研究機構認可，學術界仍以曹雪芹為公認作者。
relatedContent.textSc: 2023年，研究者曹东芳提出《红楼梦》的真正作者并非曹雪芹（约1715–1763），而是朱慈炤（1632–1708）——崇祯帝的第四子。所引证据包括小说中描写的明朝皇宫器物、上海博物馆藏甲戌本手稿，以及书中人物姓名的谐音隐喻。此说虽引起广泛公众关注，但尚未获得主流红学研究机构认可，学术界仍以曹雪芹为公认作者。
relatedContent.linkLabel: Read more: Ming Dynasty — Dream of the Red Chamber →
